title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
